title: Food at the Door
scene: 外卖员到了，你下楼取餐。

turns.en: Hi, I have your DoorDash order.
Thanks! Is this for Zhang San?
Yes, Thai food. Please double-check it.
Looks good. Should I tip in cash?
You already tipped in the app. Thank you!
Great. Have a good one!

title: Wrong Order
scene: 外卖送错了，你联系骑手。

turns.cn: 你好，这不是我点的，我点的是牛肉面。
turns.en: Hi, this isn't my order. I ordered beef noodle soup.

turns.cn: 抱歉，可能拿混了，我回去换。
turns.en: Sorry, I must have mixed it up. I'll go swap it.

turns.cn: 大概要多久？我已经很饿了。
turns.en: How long will that take? I'm pretty hungry.

turns.cn: 十五分钟，餐厅会重做一份。
turns.en: About fifteen minutes. The restaurant will remake it.

turns.cn: 好的，到了请给我打电话。
turns.en: Okay. Please call me when you're back.
Will do. Sorry again!

title: Delivery Instructions
scene: 你打电话给外卖员说明送餐细节。

turns.cn: 喂，我是送您外卖的，找不到门。
turns.en: Hi, I'm delivering your food. I can't find the entrance.

turns.cn: 走侧门，在停车场那边，我下来接你。
turns.en: Use the side door by the parking lot. I'll come down.
Okay. I'm wearing a red jacket.
I see you. Over here!
Here you go. Enjoy it while it's hot.
Thanks. Drive safe!

title: Grocery Delivery
scene: 超市生鲜送到家，有商品缺货。

turns.cn: 您好，牛奶没货了，能换脱脂的吗？
turns.en: Hi, they're out of milk. Can I substitute skim?
Sure. Do you have eggs?

turns.cn: 有，一打大的。香蕉太青，要换吗？
turns.en: Yes, a dozen large. The bananas are green. Want a swap?

turns.cn: 青的也行，放门口就行，我在开会。
turns.en: Green is fine. Leave it at the door. I'm in a meeting.
Okay. I'll send a photo when I arrive.
Thank you!

title: Late Delivery
scene: 外卖迟了四十分钟，你询问情况。

turns.cn: 客服中心，请问有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Customer support. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我的订单晚了四十分钟，还没送到。
turns.en: My order is forty minutes late and still hasn't arrived.

turns.cn: 抱歉，我查一下……骑手还在路上。
turns.en: I'm sorry. Let me check. The driver is still on the way.
Can I get a refund? The food will be cold.

turns.cn: 可以部分退款，并送您一张五元优惠券。
turns.en: We can offer a partial refund and a five-dollar coupon.
Fine. Please go ahead with that.

title: Wrong Item Delivered
scene: 外卖送来的饭菜和你点的不一致。

turns.cn: 不好意思，这份好像不是我的订单。
turns.en: Excuse me, this doesn't look like my order.

turns.cn: 我核对一下单号……确实拿错了。
turns.en: Let me check the order number. I grabbed the wrong bag.

turns.cn: 我点的是鸡肉饭，这是牛肉面。
turns.en: I ordered chicken rice, but this is beef noodles.

turns.cn: 我回去换正确的，大概十五分钟。
turns.en: I'll swap it for the right one. About fifteen minutes.
Could you bring utensils too?
No problem. Sorry for the trouble.
It's okay. Thanks.
